name: auditcov
description: AuditCov connects Codex to a local cross-agent objective source-read coverage server.

interface.shortDescription: Track objective read coverage for code audits.
interface.longDescription: AuditCov adds a thin MCP adapter and Codex skill for a local coverage server shared with Claude Code and OpenCode. Projects are created in the Web UI and coverage remains separate from security completeness.
defaultPrompt: Use AuditCov to audit this repo until read coverage reaches 80%.
Use AuditCov to track objective read coverage for this module.
